login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the control panel

forgot.title: Recover password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link
forgot.sentBody: If the email is registered, a reset link is on its way.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account
reset.invalidLink: The reset link is invalid or incomplete.

verifyEmail.title: Email not verified
verifyEmail.subtitle: You cannot access the admin panel until your email is verified.
verifyEmail.step1: Request a verification link by email using the button below (if email is configured).
verifyEmail.step2: Or ask an admin to verify it from: User Management → Edit user → "Email Verified".

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
